$comment: DECLARE-ONLY — NOT APPLIED (TIN-2541). PR-env / reaper lane CONTRACT for GFTB on-cluster web previews, modeled on blahaj:tofu/intent/massageithaca/pr-env-lanes.schema.json and the blahaj/MI reaper lifecycle. This is a NAMES-ONLY, FAIL-CLOSED schema: `enabled` is false, no live GitHub token / kubeconfig / tunnel credential is referenced by value (names only), and no reaper workflow or CronJob is materialized. A 2026-07-05 live probe retired the old pod-headroom blocker; this lane remains parked because preview lifecycle and tunnel-route authority are not adopted for GFTB, and Cloudflare Pages already supplies Access-gated managed previews. This file records the parked contract so a future ADR has a grounded starting point; it authorizes nothing.
recommended_alternative: Cloudflare Pages managed per-PR previews under *.greatfallstoolbus-org.pages.dev (already Access-gated account-wide; zero pods, zero new tunnel routes). See ADR 0001 Option A.

label_contract.$comment: The blahaj reaper selects on these labels; teardown fires only on POSITIVE evidence (TTL passed OR PR confirmed closed). `unknown` never destroys.

teardown_model.$comment: Three-leg defense-in-depth, mirroring blahaj (do NOT clone live — blahaj's own docs mark it legacy/transitional, TIN-2023/TIN-2027). Every leg here is DECLARED, none is WIRED.

leg_1_pr_close_dispatch.note: would delete the pr-<n> namespace's workloads to free pod slots

leg_2_ttl_reaper_workflow.note: would select on the label_contract and destroy only on TTL-passed OR confirmed-closed; bounded by --max-destroys; a fine-grained read-only Pull Requests PAT is referenced BY NAME only (never inlined): github-pr-read-token

leg_3_incluster_backstop_cronjob.note: would tolerate the compute-expansion taint so it runs when the runner pool is saturated; models blahaj:deploy/honey/massageithaca-pr-lane-backstop-reaper.yaml

guards.never_touch: greatfallstoolbus-org-production (production namespace is structurally excluded from every reaper selector)
guards.fail_safe: destroy only on positive evidence; a single ambiguous PR-state lookup falls back to TTL-only; a total GitHub API outage or a missing/placeholder token fails the reaper LOUD (never silently green)

secrets_named_only.github_pr_read_token: fine-grained read-only Pull Requests PAT for Great-Falls-Tool-Bus/greatfallstoolbus.org; NAME only, custody operator-side; not stored in this repo
secrets_named_only.reaper_kubeconfig: namespace-scoped SA kubeconfig; NAME only; protected environment; not stored in this repo

preview_lane_status.$comment: PARKED. The 2026-07-05 live probe measured enough pod headroom for a replicas=2 production web deployment and retired the old ~103-104/110 honey blocker. This preview lane remains disabled because GFTB has not adopted per-PR on-cluster route automation or reaper ownership, and the managed Pages preview lane remains the approved default.
preview_lane_status.pod_headroom: resolved by live read-only kubectl probe on 2026-07-05
preview_lane_status.route_authority: not adopted for per-PR on-cluster hostnames
